metadata.description: Open-source Nintendo 3DS emulator based on Citra

doc.source: The immutable upstream unified-source release is hash-pinned and carries GIT-TAG/GIT-COMMIT identity files. Nix verifies both files against this contract before configuration.
doc.platforms: Only the Steam Deck's x86_64-linux closure is declared. Other hosts fail during Nix evaluation.
doc.rendering: The directly linked game phase receives semantic top and bottom regions after TryPresent's final blit. OpenGLRenderWidget copies the ABI 2 frame pointer map into GRenderWindow before the post-UI phase and SwapBuffers. Mouse and touch events map only through bottom surface 1 and enter the native-coordinate touch path. Render-target release emits no inactive report.
